flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Riveroak Technical College rose 41% between 2001 and 2003 ($5.7k → $8.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Riveroak Technical College rose 27% between 2001 and 2003 ($1.8k → $2.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Riveroak Technical College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (199 → 250).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Riveroak Technical College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 (57.1% → 71.2%).
